pokeball.name: Poke Ball
pokeball.desc: A standard ball for catching wild Pokemon.

greatball.name: Great Ball
greatball.desc: A good ball with a higher catch rate.

ultraball.name: Ultra Ball
ultraball.desc: An excellent ball with a very high catch rate.

masterball.name: Master Ball
masterball.desc: Catches any wild Pokemon without fail.

helditempack.name: Held Item Pack
helditempack.desc: Pick 1 of 3 held items to put on a Pokemon

lure.name: Lure
lure.desc: 50% chance to encounter 2 wild Pokémon instead of 1.

revive.name: Revive
revive.desc: Revives a Pokemon to half its maximum HP.

maxrevive.name: Max Revive
maxrevive.desc: Revives a Pokemon to its maximum HP.

expall.name: Exp. All
expall.desc: Gives 20% Exp. to all non-fainted Pokemon not in the battle. Stacks up to 5 times.

expcharm.name: Exp. Charm
expcharm.desc: Boosts total EXP gained by the entire party by 25%. Stacks up to 99 times.

hpup.name: HP Up
hpup.desc: Raises the HP EVs of a Pokémon by 10. Max 252 per stat, 508 total.

protein.name: Protein
protein.desc: Raises the Attack EVs of a Pokémon by 10. Max 252 per stat, 508 total.

iron.name: Iron
iron.desc: Raises the Defense EVs of a Pokémon by 10. Max 252 per stat, 508 total.

calcium.name: Calcium
calcium.desc: Raises the Sp. Atk EVs of a Pokémon by 10. Max 252 per stat, 508 total.

zinc.name: Zinc
zinc.desc: Raises the Sp. Def EVs of a Pokémon by 10. Max 252 per stat, 508 total.

carbos.name: Carbos
carbos.desc: Raises the Speed EVs of a Pokémon by 10. Max 252 per stat, 508 total.
